step_rationale: Excitatory amino acid; systemic acute-phase marker; off-pathway.
mechanism: L-Glutamic acid is an amino acid metabolite whose elevation associates with myocardial infarction via systemic metabolic and neurohormonal pathways.

references.title: Plasma Metabolic Profiling and Multiclass Diagnostic Model Development for Stable Angina Pectoris and Acute Myocardial Infarction.
